programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series races at Bristol Motor Speedway in Tennessee. Driver Kyle Larson defends his past victory on this concrete oval against points leader Tyler Reddick. They must battle over five hundred grueling laps to secure a massive win today.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: As this high stakes cash game reaches its climax, the Loose Cannon's wedding plans hang in the balance. There's more than just money at risk in a huge pot between Jason Koon and Morgan Jay.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: It's the most exciting line-up to date with NFL star Rob Gronkowski making his high stakes Hold'em debut in Las Vegas alongside poker legends Phil Hellmuth and Antonio Esfandiari.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: Four-time Super Bowl champion Rob Gronkowski makes it a family affair, as his dad steps in to make a crucial play; poker pro Antonio Esfandiari and sports broadcaster Nick Wright continue to trade blows.

programme.title: Tua
programme.desc: Tua Tagovailoa, a generational football talent, embarks on a journey that began from a childhood family prophecy; Tua attempts to overcome a career-threatening injury and rise as one of the most uniquely skilled players in the history of the game.

programme.title: The Great Brady Heist
programme.desc: Chronicling the disappearance of Tom Brady's jersey following the New England Patriots' improbable Super Bowl LI comeback win over the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Truck Series arrives in Bristol for 250 laps of short-track racing. Corey Heim and Ben Rhodes look to navigate the steep banking and heavy traffic at Bristol Motor Speedway to secure a critical early-season victory in Tennessee.

programme.title: Women's Football Weekly
programme.desc: Discover the best of the action from the top divisions of women's football in Italy, Germany and the Netherlands with this brand-new highlights show.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes breakdown the 26 soccer players who will define the 2026 World Cup.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the Brokk robot versus Brian Shaw, the world's strongest man; the E-One fire truck versus Charlie Hobson, a flamethrower expert; and the Cold Jet ice blaster versus Tuff N Lite fabric.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn's frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone's mind.

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-func

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah's Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paper

programme.title: Diamond River Hunters
programme.desc: The pressure is on to find the big stones before the winter snow drives the team from the valley. A geological survey reveals there is a huge opportunity.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah's new menu.

programme.title: Kangaroo Mob
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart' kangaroos moving into Australia's capital city and the ecologistsfollowing their every move.Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys– mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice.After 15 years of drought, Canberra's Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens ofAustralia's “bush capital” provide a relia

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson's film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV, they open fire and Mel uses a bad guy in the cab as a shield. Test 2 will be after he escapes from cab Mel finds himself under the SUV and shoots up through the SUV at the bad guys.

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet house hunters Chris and his best mate Craig. Chris is looking for a multi million dollar waterfront property on the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet Diane and her son Alex. They're searching for a multi million dollar apartment in Melbourne.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: Down to Earth with Zac Efron - Season 2
programme.desc: Leaders and representatives of Aboriginal communities show Zac and Darin how Indigenous cultures live to protect and preserve the land.

programme.title: Heavy Load
programme.desc: Transports with difficulties. Whether a nearly 50-metre-long rotor blade or a 75-metre-long, gigantic gearbox with a total weight of 442 tonnes - obstacles lurk everywhere. The transport leads uphill, through narrow turns, past houses right at the edge of the road, over soggy paths and through narrow bridges. programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy? Will a shotgun blast really throw you back through a window? Can a single shot from a colt revolver break shackles? If you shoot dynamite, will it explode?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - Season 2

programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah's new menu.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: Five years after saving the Lego world, Emmet must once again save everyone with the help of Rex Dangervest when new enemies from outer space attack them.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: When his former superior, Colonel Samuel, asks him to join him on a special mission in Afghanistan, Rambo declines. However, when he is held hostage and tortured, Rambo decides to step in.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: As a powerful crime lord threatens New York City, a team of mutant turtles trained in martial arts tries to leave their hidden lair to defend their beloved home from impending danger.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: After being abandoned at a fair, Billy constantly searches for his mother. His life, however, takes a huge turn when he inherits superpowers from a powerful wizard.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The GI Joes are declared traitors by Zartan, with Cobra Commander now having all the world leaders under his control. With nowhere to go, the team turns to its original leader, General Colton.

programme.title: Teratak Mahligai
programme.desc: Drama kemasyarakatan yang memaparkan tentang hubungan kekeluargaan, persahabatan dan percintaan.

programme.title: 3 T 3 Dara

Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Pantang Pulang Sebelum Aku dan Kamu Jadi Kita
programme.desc: Dania (Nabila Zavira) works in Evan's (Erdin Werdrayana) office as a cleaning service, but when Evan arrives, Dania suddenly slips and kicks a bucket filled with dirty water until it hits Evan's head. Evan, who was shocked, suddenly fainted, made Dania panic.

programme.title: Rindu Itu Berat Makan Pisang Aja Biar Kuat
programme.desc: Hayatun (Shanice Margaretha) is the son of a banana farmer who has a lot of debt. On the other hand, Hayatun has a dream to get a good, rich and romantic soulmate. Unfortunately, the one who comes is Jaenudin (Masaji Wijayanto), a mysterious guy with a myriad of problems he has. Surprisingly, Hayatun introduces Jaenudin as an engineer who will help the banana farmers in his village.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

The first responders race to rescue victims trapped in various tight spots; Athena contemplates accepting a promotion that will take her out of the field; Chimney finally deals with the aftermath of his near fatal car crash.
